topics.title: Rock and Roll Hall of Fame Induction
topics.summary: The show discusses the logistical mess surrounding Van Halen's induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame, including David Lee Roth's refusal to perform and the band's internal tensions.

topics.title: Public Safety and Celebrity Weight Loss
topics.summary: The studio discusses a woman's confrontation with teenagers over an animal, celebrity weight loss progress, and the dynamics of personal relationships.

topics.title: Eric the Midget Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a segment involving a recording of a comedy song and an interview with Eric the Midget regarding his daily routine, personal life, and theories on American Idol.

topics.title: Radio Industry Trends and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses radio ratings, potential satellite mergers, and features a guest appearance by George Takei.

topics.title: Artie Lange and Local News Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including listener feedback on Artie Lange, a report on his dining habits at Uptown Pizzeria, and an announcement regarding upcoming performances in Las Vegas.

topics.title: Debate Between Scott the Pace and John the
topics.summary: The studio hosts a structured debate between two callers, Scott the Pace and John the Stutterer, on topics including gay marriage and global warming.

topics.title: Debate on Politics, Marriage, and Culture
topics.summary: The studio hosts a heated debate between two callers regarding the conviction of Scooter Libby, the legality of polygamy, and the cultural implications of pornography.

topics.title: Conventions and Celebrity Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of celebrity appearances at conventions, specifically comparing the high fees and autograph costs associated with actors like William Shatner to their own experiences in the industry.

topics.title: Bill Shatner and Fever Drink Promotion
topics.summary: The studio discusses Bill Shatner's professional reputation and a promotional appearance by models for an herbal beverage called 'Fever' that claims to increase libido.

topics.title: Fever Product Demonstration and Fan Feedback
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring two women who test a product called Fever, followed by a review of listener feedback regarding the show's staff and guest appearances.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and News Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a gossip game with Mike Walker, segments on celebrity news including Lindsay Lohan and Stuttering John, and updates on upcoming events.

topics.title: Weight Loss Competition and Radio Segments
topics.summary: The studio discusses the progress of participants in a weight loss competition, including specific updates on candidates like Benji and Ganji, while also addressing listener feedback and upcoming radio segments.

topics.title: Radio Industry News and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio discusses personal stories regarding celebrity interactions, the merger between Sirius and XM satellite radio, and recent news involving media hiring.

topics.title: Media Gossip and Iraq War Developments
topics.summary: The studio discusses television personalities like Katie Couric and Rosie O'Donnell, the upcoming Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction for Van Halen, a lottery winner's windfall, and various political updates regarding the Iraq War and military policy.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Current Events Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a segment covering personal anecdotes from a caller, political updates on Rudy Giuliani, international news regarding the King of Jordan, and commentary on television personalities like Star Jones and Andy Richer.
